title: Taking meeting notes (agenda/action items) inside Monday
excerpt:
We’re a meeting notes and calendar automation tool that is about to start building an integration with Monday.

posts.author: mellamojordan84 (Jordan England-Nelson)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re a meeting notes and calendar automation tool that is about to start building an integration with Monday.

The idea is to make it easier for Monday users to create collaborative agendas, take notes and assign action items during meetings, and to view and interact with all of this content within Monday.

If you’d be interested in a plugin like this, we’d love to talk to you to learn about how best to implement this integration. Reply below and I can send you a link to book a call.

Thanks!

posts.author: srknmrt (Serkan Mert)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mellamojordan84 Hi there,
I hope we will be discussing it seriously and activate it in a near future. I’ve tried many softwares but I couldn’t find the perfect one. I’m ready to contribute with my notes, methods and expectations on this issue.
